title: Classification and Properties of Linear Mappings
description: A flowchart showing the classification of linear mappings based on their properties like injectivity and surjectivity, leading to the concept of an isomorphism.
relationships: The kernel determines injectivity: T is injective iff Ker(T) = {0}
The image determines surjectivity: T is surjective iff Im(T) = W
T is an isomorphism (bijective) iff it is both injective and surjective
